title: Implement Cryptographic Mechanisms to Prevent Unauthorized Disclosure in Transit
description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.

checks.name: TLS 1.2 is Enabled
checks.purpose: Verify TLS 1.2 is enabled in the SCHANNEL registry to ensure strong encryption is available for all communications

checks.name: TLS 1.0 is Disabled
checks.purpose: Confirm TLS 1.0 is disabled for both client and server roles in SCHANNEL, removing weak encryption from the allowed cipher suite list

checks.name: SMB Signing is Required
checks.purpose: Verify LanmanWorkstation RequireSecuritySignature = 1 to protect SMB communications from tampering and relay attacks

checks.name: RDP Encryption Level is High or FIPS
checks.purpose: Confirm RDP MinEncryptionLevel is 3 (High) or 4 (FIPS) to encrypt all Remote Desktop sessions protecting CUI in transit

checks.name: TLS 1.2 is Enabled
checks.purpose: Verify TLS 1.2 is enabled in SCHANNEL on the server to ensure strong encryption for all server communications

checks.name: TLS 1.0 is Disabled
checks.purpose: Confirm TLS 1.0 is disabled on the server for both client and server roles, removing weak ciphers

checks.name: SMB Server Signing is Required
checks.purpose: Verify LanmanServer RequireSecuritySignature = 1 to mandate SMB signing for all server-side file sharing connections

checks.name: RDP Encryption Level is High or FIPS
checks.purpose: Confirm RDP encryption is set to High or FIPS on the server to protect remote management sessions

checks.name: LDAP Signing is Required
checks.purpose: Verify LDAP server signing requirements enforce signed LDAP communications to prevent credential relay attacks over directory services

checks.name: SSH Uses Strong Ciphers and MACs
checks.purpose: Verify sshd is configured with modern ciphers (e.g., chacha20-poly1305, aes256-gcm) and strong MACs, excluding weak algorithms like arcfour and hmac-md5

checks.name: OpenSSL Supports TLS 1.2 or Higher
checks.purpose: Verify the installed OpenSSL version is at least 1.0.1 to support TLS 1.2, ensuring cryptographic mechanisms are available for application-level encryption

checks.name: Encryption in Transit Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy mandates encryption for all CUI in transit across all protocols â€” policy review only

checks.name: SSH Uses Strong Ciphers and MACs
checks.purpose: Verify sshd is configured with modern ciphers (e.g., chacha20-poly1305, aes256-gcm) and strong MACs, excluding weak algorithms like arcfour and hmac-md5

checks.name: OpenSSL Supports TLS 1.2 or Higher
checks.purpose: Verify the installed OpenSSL version is at least 1.0.1 to support TLS 1.2, ensuring cryptographic mechanisms are available for application-level encryption

checks.name: Encryption in Transit Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy mandates encryption for all CUI in transit across all protocols â€” policy review only

remediation: Enable TLS 1.2 and TLS 1.3 via SCHANNEL registry settings and disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Require SMB signing via GPO. Set RDP MinEncryptionLevel to 3 or 4. On Linux, configure /etc/ssh/sshd_config with modern Ciphers, MACs, and KexAlgorithms and reload sshd.
